subject: fix(gsd): allow safe verify metacharacters

fix: tighten pnpm install path detection
fix(gsd): ignore nested SvelteKit types imports
fix(issue): complete-slice retry loop silently drops a reopened task via empty replan
fix: sync engine package lockfile entries
fix: wait for npm release tarball propagation

fix(gsd): keep grep/find/ls available during guided discuss dispatches
fix: gate all stranded work during auto bootstrap
fix(bug-3): Pre-dispatch break leaves ghost iterations open pre-dispatch break now finishes the open journal iteration.

fix(branding): render block P and i in GSD-Pi wordmark
fix(gsd): dedupe provider error guards
fix(bug-2): Unhandled-phase warnings pause instead of retrying fresh state unhandled-phase warnings now retry dispatch once with freshly derived state before pausing.
